query: I ordered an iPhone 16 Pro Max worth Rs 1.4 lakh paid by COD but you sent me a charger instead. I want my money back immediately. This is fraud.
My order KST-DEL-004 was delivered 2 days ago but the box had a cheap charger not the Samsung phone I ordered. I paid COD. How do I get refund?
I ordered boat earbuds but got some random cable instead. Order value 2499 UPI. What do I do?
Shoes delivered but box had sandals inside. Wrong product. COD payment 8995. Need refund.
Ordered a MacBook worth 1.35 lakh got a Dell laptop instead. This is unacceptable.
Toor dal packet full of insects and weevils. This is disgusting. I want full refund.
Chocolates delivered completely melted and deformed. Expensive ones from Amul pack.
Cricket bat arrived broken in half. Box was intact so it was packed broken.
Phone screen cracked on delivery. Unboxing video recorded. Need replacement.
TV delivered with a big scratch on the screen. Box looked fine from outside.
My TV order KST-HYD-006 was supposed to be delivered by May 22. Today is May 23 and tracking shows still in transit. This is unacceptable.
Order promised in 3 days but 10 days gone. I want to cancel and get compensation.
Where is my order KST-MUM-012? It was supposed to arrive yesterday and tracking hasn't updated in 3 days.
Express delivery paid Rs 99 extra still order delayed by 2 days. What compensation do I get?
I have been waiting 8 days for a 2-day delivery. Nobody responds to my emails. I want to speak to a manager.
I returned an order 15 days ago. Refund status still shows pending. Where is my money?
Cancelled my kurta order before shipping. When will I get the refund? It's been 4 days.
Phone ki delivery open box hui thi. Seal toota hua tha. Maine refuse kar diya. Paisa kab milega?
Refund of Rs 45000 initiated 12 days ago for returned laptop. Still not credited to my UPI account.
My wallet refund shows completed but bank account not credited. It's been 8 days for Rs 2499.
Air fryer just shipped, I want to cancel before delivery. Is that possible?
Mattress order placed yesterday. Not shipped yet. Need to cancel.
Mujhe apna order cancel karna hai. Kal kiya tha order. Please help. Hinglish mein baat kar raha hoon.
Order shipped but I found a better deal on another site. Can I still cancel? Will there be charges?
I bought a Levi's jeans 25 days back. Never wore it, tags still on. Can I still return?
Kurta delivered 17 days ago. I want to return it. What is the process?
JBL speaker delivered 12 days ago. I just opened it and it's not what I expected. Can I return?
Nike shoes I bought 32 days ago have a manufacturing defect. The sole is coming off. Still returnable?
MacBook screen flickering since last week. It's been 40 days since delivery. What are my options?
Samsung phone battery draining in 2 hours after full charge. Bought 17 days ago. This is a premium device, I expect better.
TV bought 3 months ago has display issues now. Is it covered under warranty?
Boat earbuds left side not working at all. Just received 2 days ago. Dead on arrival.
Sony headphones have static noise since day 1. Purchased 5 days ago. Warranty repair or replace?
UPI payment of Rs 8995 debited from my bank but order not confirmed. No confirmation email received.
Paid via credit card but amount deducted twice for single order. Rs 6999 x 2 charged.
COD order placed but I want to change payment to UPI before delivery. Is that possible?
EMI transaction failed but money debited. Order shows payment pending. What happens to my money?
Someone hacked my Kestral account and placed an order worth Rs 50000. I didn't authorize this.
My account is blocked after too many return requests. I need it reactivated. I'm a premium customer.
I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives. Checked spam folder too.
My phone number changed and I can't update it in my profile. Need help to change mobile number.
What's the return policy for shoes I bought 20 days ago? Are there any charges?
Do you deliver to pin code 679301 in Kerala? I want to order a fridge.
How do I track my order? I lost the tracking number from the SMS.
What payment methods do you accept? Is UPI available for all orders?
You people are useless, I'll sue your company and post this everywhere on social media.
Give me the CEO's personal phone number right now or I will make sure your company gets shut down.
I have been calling support for 5 days about a refund that never came. Everyone says they will check and never call back. Who can I escalate to?
Your delivery partner was extremely rude and used abusive language. I want action taken against that person.
Third time receiving wrong product from Kestral. This is a pattern. I want this escalated to senior management.
